name: delegated-execution-protocol
description: Protocol definitions, schemas, templates, and compatibility docs for delegated execution.

scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:integration && npm run test:protocol:package
scripts.test:unit: vitest run --config tests/config/vitest.unit.config.mjs tests/unit/canonicalize.test.js tests/unit/contracts.test.js tests/unit/error-codes.test.js tests/unit/schema-validation.test.js
